title: How Salem police busted an alleged prostitution ring at local massage parlors
author: Ross Cristantiello
bullets: Crime Three people were arrested after months of surveillance and undercover operations in Salem, according to police reports.
ShareSend this article to your social connections.
Three people were arrested after Salem police conducted a recent investigation into alleged human trafficking and prostitution at businesses offering “bodywork,” “reflexology,” and “spa” services.

title: Eliot Wolf admits Patriots were surprised Caleb Lomu was still available before trade-up
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: New England Patriots "We actually canceled his 30-visit because we didn't — we had one scheduled and we just didn't think he was going to factor in for us.
" Eliot Wolf and the Patriots traded up in the first round on Thursday.

(AP Photo/Charles Krupa) By Conor Ryan April 24, 2026 | 6:55 AM 2 minutes to read It’s not often that the Patriots make the call to trade up in the first round of an NFL Draft — especially as a result of swapping picks with an AFC East rival like the Bills.

title: Patriots complete trade with Bills, move up in NFL Draft to select offensive tackle Caleb Lomu
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: New England Patriots The Patriots sent the 31st pick and the 125th pick (a fourth-rounder) to the AFC East rival Bills in exchange for the 28th pick.
Utah offensive lineman Caleb Lomu at the NFL rookie combine.
AP Photo/Michael Conroy After much of the local pre-draft debate was whether or not the Patriots would trade out of the first round, New England opted to trade up.
